hooks.command: fp=$(grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1); case "$fp" in *check-refs.sh*|*check-refs.test.sh*) out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/scripts/check-refs.test.sh" 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac

fp=$(grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1); case "$fp" in *scaffold.sh*|*scaffold.test.sh*) out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/scripts/scaffold.test.sh" 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac

fp=$(grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1); case "$fp" in *check-onboarded.sh*|*check-onboarded.schema*|*check-onboarded.test.sh*) out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/scripts/check-onboarded.test.sh" 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac

fp=$(grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1); case "$fp" in *caveman-activate.js*|*caveman-mode-tracker.js*|*caveman/SKILL.md*|*caveman-hooks.test.sh*) out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/scripts/caveman-hooks.test.sh" 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac

fp=$(grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1); case "$fp" in */mocks/*/*) root=$(printf '%s' "$fp" | sed -E 's/.*"file_path"[^"]*"([^"]*)".*/\1/' | sed -E 's#(.*/mocks/[^/]+)/.*#\1#'); out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/scripts/check-refs.sh" "$root" 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac
